calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-23-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: V.Mack, CSR: Margaret Del Coto

Petitioners, Kelly Xiaomei Chen (mother) and Vito Guo Wei Chen (father) present, with minor, in pro per, were sworn and examined.

The Court grants the petition for change of the MINOR'S name to : Kayla Jia Chen
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-16-2003 Reset To Sep-23-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V.Mack, CSR: Kent Gubbine
Petitioner Kelly Xiaomei Chen present, but left before the calendar was called. Due to missing information in the petition, the matter is continued to SEP-23-2003 at 9:00 am in Dept. 218.
